name_en: Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
name_cn:
Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 446744.
Dimensions: 22(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Light Pink / Genuine leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick.
